title: Chromolaena chaseae
taxonomy: Chromolaena chaseae is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Chromolaena, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical and subtropical regions. The family Asteraceae, also known as the daisy family, is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. The classification of Chromolaena chaseae is further supported by its characteristics, such as its hairy leaves and purple flowers. Chromolaena chaseae is often classified as a synonym of Chromolaena odorata, but further research is needed to confirm this classification.
